title: Gold loans are becoming the biggest driver of consumer borrowing? Here's what RBI FSR report says
summary: Gold loans have become India's fastest-growing retail credit, recording a CAGR of 42.4% since March 2024, nearly double the 23% growth in non-housing retail loans.&nbsp;

title: Can your debt mutual fund withstand liquidity pressure? Here's what the RBI financial stability report reveals
summary: The RBI's stress tests revealed 44 open-ended debt mutual funds breached liquidity thresholds in March 2026. Despite this, the central bank reports no immediate concerns, as affected funds have either rectified the issue or initiated corrective actions.

summary: Despite market volatility, SIP inflows reached a record ₹32,086 crore in March 2026, according to the RBI's Financial Stability Report.&nbsp;

title: Is an online will legally valid? Here's what families should know
summary: A will prepared using an online platform is legally valid in India if it meets statutory requirements. But families should ensure it reflects the testator's specific circumstances and assets.
